content.en:
Time flies.

Relying on a large amount of Ancient Gold Juice, Ye Tian's heart gradually reached the limit of the Five Blood Transformation Realm.

Finally, on this day, Ye Tian's heart could not continue to be refined, it had already reached its limit, and the next step was to let the heart transform, so as to promote the sixth transformation of immeasurable blood.

"Whew!"

Ye Tian was very excited, he didn't expect to quench his heart to the limit of five blood transformation realms so quickly, he thought that he would need endless years to quench his heart to the extreme!

I have to say that the Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor is really his lucky star, allowing him to pick up such a big opportunity in vain!

However, for an ancient-level genius like Ye Tian, it was not easy for five Blood Transformation Realms to impact six Blood Transformation Realms, and he didn't dare to say when he would be able to break through.

"Maybe you can use the Ancient Technique of Primeval Movement to impact the Six Blood Transformation Realms!" Ye Tian decided.

Although it would be more difficult to break through in the future by cultivating more primeval techniques, he was now at the extreme of the five blood transformation realms, and using the primeval techniques to stimulate his heart could break the shackles.

Of course, he didn't have enough primeval gold blood in his hands now, and he had to trade some primeval gold blood from the primeval dragon and snake clan.

"We have to continue to buy from the Sea Dragons!"

In the same way, he went to the White Sea Treasure Land where the Sea Dragon Clan was located to collect Dragon Snake Stones.

Of course, even if he copied the body of a member of a certain Sea Dragon Clan, he didn't dare to collect a large number of them, so he could only collect a few less again and again, spending a lot of time to acquire them.

In this way, the risk of exposure is not great, it just takes a few more years.

In the following years, Ye Tian used this method to collect dragon and snake stones, and after collecting a lot of dragon and snake stones, he traded the ancient gold blood with the ancient dragon and snake clan.

With the primeval golden blood, Ye Tian began to cultivate the primeval body.

Cultivating the third primeval technique is naturally more difficult than the second primeval technique.

Failed again and again, a large amount of primeval gold blood was consumed.

And Ye Tian's understanding of the ancient art of moving the body is also getting deeper and deeper, as long as he is given time, he can definitely practice.

"Hayes Heavenly Ancestor, come to me again!"

Ye Tian immediately entered the Ancient God Realm.

This time, Hayes Tianzu and Ye Tian competed, and Ye Tian was completely dominant.

Even if he didn't use the Ancient Blood Spear and hid his strength, he was too familiar with the Ancient Blood Spear of the Hays Heavenly Ancestor's Ancient Technique, so he could easily seize the opportunity to defeat the Hays Heavenly Ancestor.

Rumble!!!!

After Ye Tian seized the opportunity, he didn't give the Hayes Heavenly Ancestor any room to reverse, and under the continuous attack, he completely defeated the Hays Heavenly Ancestor.

This time, Hayes Heavenly Ancestor was beaten to the point of doubting his life.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, how did your strength become stronger?"

Hayes Heavenly Ancestor said in confusion.

Ye Tian explained: "I am comprehending the primeval blood spear, which is an ancient technique, so I know your primeval blood spear very well, so I can easily seize the opportunity to defeat you!"

"Really?"

Hayes Heavenly Ancestor was a little skeptical, after all, if he couldn't practice the Ancient Blood Spear, he wouldn't know it!

He also comprehended the Ancient God and Demon Fist, why didn't he gain anything?

"Looking back, I will also comprehend more of the Ancient God and Demon Fist, even if I don't cultivate, it is better to comprehend more!"

Hayes Heavenly Ancestor left the Ancient God Realm with this thought.

"It's a fool of the Hays Heavenly Ancestor!" Ye Tian muttered, "When I break through to the Sixth Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor, I'll exchange the Ancient Golden Leaf with the Hays Heavenly Ancestor!"

Subsequently, he also left the primeval god realm.

......

The Sea Dragons.

At this time, Xue Yu, the patriarch of the Sea Dragon Clan, already knew that the Dragon Snake Stone in the clan had disappeared a lot, and the number was small before, so it didn't matter, but at the moment the number was a little too much.

"Which clan did it this time?"

Xue Yu asked.

"It's Topa!" the sea dragon below reported, "But when we were about to interrogate Topa, he committed suicide, very similar to the previous clansmen, they all did not hesitate to annihilate themselves!"

"They can't kill themselves casually, there is only one possibility, and that is that an unknown enemy has targeted our sea dragon clan and manipulated them!"

Xue Yu was annoyed, and his first suspicion was that the primeval dragon snake clan was the primeval dragon snake clan.

Because only the primeval dragon and snake clan needed dragon snake stones in large quantities, other blood transformation realm races had little or no demand for dragon snake stones.

However, he didn't dare to kill the dragon snake sea, otherwise he would be looking for death!

"Turn over all the dragon snake stones, and don't allow the clansmen to collect the dragon snake stones privately!

Xue Yu gave this order.

Only in this way can this be prevented.

Although this order will make many people unhappy, it is better than the situation that occurs one after another.

Soon, Xue Yu confiscated all the dragon snake stones of the Sea Dragon Clan and put them all in the treasure house of the Sea Dragon Clan, and did not allow other clansmen to approach the treasure house.

And this also cut off Ye Tian's plan to continue collecting dragon snake stones.

"The Sea Dragon Clan reacted a little quickly, and the choice was very decisive, it seems that there is no way to get a large number of Dragon Snake Stones from the White Sea!" Ye Tian said helplessly.

However, the Dragon Snake Stone he sold to the Ancient Dragon and Snake Clan was also exchanged for a large amount of Ancient Golden Blood, which may be enough to successfully train the Ancient Body.

If there is really a lack of primeval golden blood, let's find a way when the time comes!

Another long time has passed.

Ye Tian continued to refine the primeval golden blood to cultivate the primeval technique of the primeval body, scrapped a replica body, and also made the amount of primeval golden blood less and less.

However, his luck was really good.

On this day, he finally succeeded in cultivating the Ancient Movement before exhausting the Ancient Golden Blood.

......

Territorial sea boundary seam, in the shock current.

Ye Tian's body moved, and he used the Ancient Movement to instantly cross a territory at a speed far exceeding the previous one, and rushed to the White Elephant City in a very short time at a terrifying speed.

Subsequently, he rushed back to the territorial waters of Wanlong from the White Elephant City.

Such a speed surpasses the past I don't know how many times.

Moreover, the Ancient Movement can also be used in battle, even if he is also an Ancient-level genius, he can easily defeat or even kill an ordinary Ancient-level genius of the same level by using the Ancient Body, the Ancient Blood Spear, and the Ancient God and Demon Fist.

Click!

The shackles of the heart seem to have cracked with the training of the ancient body.

Subsequently, he began to use the vast amount of Ancient Gold Juice to induce the transformation of the heart, thus inducing the sixth blood transformation of the immeasurable blood.

"Break it for me!"

Ye Tian rushed violently and directly tore the bottleneck apart.

The heart is constantly absorbing the energy of the Swire Gold Juice and is rapidly transforming.
